description: Declarative diagram renderer — wraps Mermaid (v1) with VB token-driven theming, lazy load, and HTML-first authoring via fenced code blocks

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: URL of a diagram source file (.mmd). Inline source via <pre><code> takes priority if absent.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: "lazy" defers render until the element scrolls into view

attributes.name: data-theme-base
attributes.description: Mermaid base theme: base|default|dark|forest|neutral. Default "base" so VB tokens win.

attributes.name: min-height
attributes.description: CSS length reserved for the diagram before render to prevent layout shift

events.name: diagram-wc:error
events.description: Render failed; the <pre> fallback is restored
